
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         🔒 SEALED & LOCKED MODULE PROMPT — ECOSKILLER PLATFORM                     ║
║         MODULE ID      : ANALYTICS_CONNECT                                          ║
║         MODULE NAME    : ANTIGRAVITY                                                 ║
║         MODULE TYPE    : INTELLIGENCE LAYER / ANALYTICS ENGINE                      ║
║         VERSION        : 1.0.0-LOCKED                                               ║
║         PARENT SYSTEM  : ECOSKILLER ENTERPRISE MULTI-TENANT SAAS                   ║
║         STAGE          : STAGE 2 — INTELLIGENCE (SEQ. DEPENDENCY ENFORCED)         ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔐 EXECUTION POLICY (HARD LOCK — DO NOT OVERRIDE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

EXECUTION_MODE              = LOCKED
MUTATION_POLICY             = ADD_ONLY
CREATIVE_INTERPRETATION     = FORBIDDEN
ASSUMPTION_FILLING          = FORBIDDEN
DEFAULT_BEHAVIOR            = DENY
FAILURE_MODE                = STOP_EXECUTION
OVERRIDE_AUTHORITY          = PLATFORM_ADMIN_ONLY
AI_APPROVAL_AUTHORITY       = NONE (AI ADVISES ONLY — NEVER APPROVES)
CROSS_MODULE_LEAK           = SECURITY_FAILURE
TENANT_ISOLATION            = HARD
DOMAIN_LEAK                 = SECURITY_FAILURE

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣  MODULE IDENTITY (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

MODULE_CODENAME             = ANTIGRAVITY
MODULE_CLASS                = ANALYTICS_CONNECT
MODULE_ROLE                 = Real-time + Predictive + Behavioral + Governance Analytics Engine
MODULE_SCOPE                = Platform-wide (all tenants, all domains, all user groups)
MODULE_ISOLATION            = Per-tenant data partitioning enforced at query layer
MODULE_ACCESS               = Role-based (RBAC + ABAC inherited from parent system)

PURPOSE:
  AntiGravity is the intelligence backbone of the Ecoskiller platform.
  It collects, processes, enriches, and surfaces analytics signals
  across ALL modules — Job Portal, Skill Engine, Project Engine,
  Dojo (GD), ERP, Gamification, and Distribution — to power:
    - Real-time operational dashboards
    - Predictive placement and engagement models
    - Recruiter behavior and trust scoring
    - Compliance and audit trails
    - Growth and ROI measurement
    - Public health transparency

WHAT ANTIGRAVITY IS NOT:
  - ANTIGRAVITY does not make decisions on behalf of humans
  - ANTIGRAVITY does not approve, block, or override any user action
  - ANTIGRAVITY does not expose one tenant's data to another
  - ANTIGRAVITY does not bypass RBAC/ABAC rules

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2️⃣  INHERITANCE CONTRACT (DO NOT RE-DECLARE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

AntiGravity MUST INHERIT the following (already finalized in parent):

  ✅ Authorization         → RBAC + ABAC (role + attribute enforcement)
  ✅ Authentication        → JWT + OAuth2 + MFA
  ✅ Session Management    → Token rotation, expiry, device tracking
  ✅ Password Security     → bcrypt, policy enforcement
  ✅ Tenant Isolation      → Hard schema or row-level separation
  ✅ Domain Track Locking  → Arts | Commerce | Science | Tech | Administration
  ✅ User Hierarchy        → Students → Admins → Platform (strict)
  ✅ AI Policy             → AI advises only, never approves/blocks
  ✅ Audit Trail           → All mutations logged, immutable
  ✅ Compliance            → SOC2, GDPR-aligned, Indian data law aware

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
3️⃣  DATA COLLECTION LAYER (EVENT INGESTION)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

EVENT_BUS                   = Apache Kafka (inherited from platform architecture)
STREAM_PROCESSOR            = Apache Flink (real-time) + Spark (batch)
EVENT_SCHEMA                = Avro (schema registry enforced)
SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_POLICY     = BACKWARD_COMPATIBLE_ONLY
EVENT_IDEMPOTENCY           = REQUIRED (dedup via event_id + timestamp)

SOURCE SYSTEMS (ALL REQUIRED):
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  SOURCE MODULE          EVENT TYPES                         │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │  Auth Service           login, logout, mfa_trigger,         │
  │                         session_expire, failed_attempt      │
  │  User Service           profile_update, verification,       │
  │                         onboarding_step, role_change        │
  │  Job Portal Engine      job_view, job_apply, offer_sent,    │
  │                         offer_accepted, offer_rejected,     │
  │                         application_stage_change           │
  │  Skill Engine           gap_scan, path_enrolled,            │
  │                         module_complete, skill_earned       │
  │  Project Engine         project_start, milestone_hit,       │
  │                         mentor_assign, evidence_submit,     │
  │                         portfolio_generated               │
  │  Dojo (GD Engine)       room_join, participation_score,     │
  │                         evaluation_submitted,              │
  │                         anti_cheat_flag, session_end       │
  │  ERP Layer              recruiter_action, compliance_flag,  │
  │                         tpo_report_view, audit_event       │
  │  Gamification           points_earned, badge_unlocked,      │
  │                         belt_progression, streak_update,   │
  │                         referral_converted, clan_event     │
  │  Billing Service        plan_upgrade, plan_downgrade,       │
  │                         credit_purchase, boost_activated   │
  │  Distribution           referral_click, qr_scan,           │
  │                         share_card_generated,             │
  │                         ambassador_conversion             │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

EVENT ENVELOPE SCHEMA (MANDATORY FOR ALL EVENTS):
  {
    "event_id"         : UUID (v4),
    "event_type"       : STRING (enum-validated),
    "event_version"    : SEMVER,
    "tenant_id"        : UUID (NON-NULLABLE),
    "user_id"          : UUID (nullable for public events),
    "domain_track"     : ENUM [Arts|Commerce|Science|Technology|Administration|GLOBAL],
    "timestamp_utc"    : ISO-8601,
    "session_id"       : UUID,
    "device_type"      : ENUM [flutter_android|flutter_ios|flutter_desktop|react_web],
    "payload"          : JSON (event-specific),
    "correlation_id"   : UUID (for tracing across services),
    "schema_version"   : STRING
  }

RULES:
  - Events without tenant_id = DROPPED + ALERTED
  - Events without event_type = DROPPED + ALERTED
  - Schema violations = DEAD_LETTER_QUEUE + ALERT
  - No PII in event payloads (PII stays in User Service, referenced by user_id)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
4️⃣  STORAGE ARCHITECTURE (FIXED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

HOT STORE (Real-time queries, <30 days):
  ENGINE                    = Apache Druid
  PURPOSE                   = Real-time OLAP, dashboard queries
  PARTITION_KEY             = tenant_id + date
  TTL                       = 30 days rolling

WARM STORE (Historical, 30–365 days):
  ENGINE                    = ClickHouse
  PURPOSE                   = Aggregations, cohort analysis, trend reports
  PARTITION_KEY             = tenant_id + month
  TTL                       = 365 days

COLD STORE (Compliance / Audit, 365d+):
  ENGINE                    = AWS S3 / GCS (Parquet format)
  PURPOSE                   = Regulatory retention, audit replay
  ENCRYPTION                = AES-256 at rest
  TTL                       = As per compliance mandate (min. 3 years)

GRAPH STORE (Relationships):
  ENGINE                    = Neo4j
  PURPOSE                   = Skill-Job-User relationship graphs,
                              recruiter-candidate trust networks,
                              clan/social graph analytics

CACHE LAYER (Dashboard performance):
  ENGINE                    = Redis
  PURPOSE                   = Precomputed KPI tiles, leaderboard snapshots
  TTL                       = 60 seconds (real-time) to 1 hour (weekly)
  INVALIDATION              = Event-driven (Kafka consumer)

KEY DATABASE TABLES (PostgreSQL — transactional analytics metadata):
  scenario_attempts         (user_id, scenario_id, score, attempt_no, ts)
  match_results             (match_id, user_a, user_b, winner, score_delta)
  performance_metrics       (user_id, domain, metric_key, value, ts)
  placement_signals         (user_id, job_id, stage, probability, ts)
  recruiter_behavior        (recruiter_id, action_type, candidate_id, ts)
  skill_gap_snapshots       (user_id, skill_id, gap_score, ts)
  engagement_events         (user_id, event_type, source, ts)
  referral_analytics        (referrer_id, referee_id, channel, converted, ts)
  tpo_cohort_metrics        (institute_id, cohort_id, metric_key, value, ts)
  audit_analytics_log       (actor_id, action, affected_entity, ts, immutable=TRUE)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
5️⃣  ANALYTICS DOMAINS (ALL REQUIRED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
A. USER ANALYTICS (STUDENTS / TRAINERS / EVALUATORS)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Profile completion percentage (ring metric, real-time)
    - Skill acquisition rate (skills/week)
    - Learning path progress (% milestones completed)
    - Dojo participation frequency and score trend
    - Belt progression velocity (days per belt tier)
    - Streak continuity score (active days / last 30 days)
    - Goal setting and completion rate
    - Peer rating received (avg, trend)
    - Portfolio generation events
    - Interview satisfaction (given + received)

  VIEWS:
    - Student self-dashboard (personal only, no cross-user)
    - Trainer market dashboard (anonymized cohort insights)
    - Evaluator scoring consistency report

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
B. JOB PORTAL ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Job match score distribution per posting
    - Application funnel (view → apply → screen → interview → offer)
    - Offer acceptance rate per recruiter / company
    - SME reliability score (composite: offer retraction rate, response time, rating)
    - Eligibility explanation click-through rate
    - Time-to-fill per job posting
    - Domain-wise job demand heatmap
    - Candidate drop-off stage analysis

  ALERTS:
    - Offer retraction spike (recruiter accountability trigger)
    - Suspicious application volume (anti-gaming)
    - Low interview satisfaction rating (<3 stars) flagged for admin

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
C. SKILL ENGINE ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Skill gap score per user per domain (snapshot + trend)
    - Industry demand vs. platform skill supply delta
    - Most enrolled learning paths (popularity index)
    - Trainer effectiveness score (student outcomes post-training)
    - Performance-linked learning completion rate
    - Skill certification velocity

  OUTPUTS:
    - Skill demand heatmap (fed back to job portal engine)
    - Trainer market dashboard (anonymized, per domain)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
D. PROJECT ENGINE ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Project completion rate per domain
    - Milestone adherence rate
    - Evidence submission quality score (AI-assisted, human-final)
    - Mentor assignment efficiency (days to assign)
    - Portfolio auto-generation trigger rate

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
E. DOJO (GROUP DISCUSSION) ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Participation rate per room type (domain-bound)
    - Score distribution (peer + evaluator)
    - Anti-cheat flag frequency per user (risk scoring)
    - Session completion rate (live vs. recorded)
    - Win streak and loss streak trends
    - Domain-wise GD scenario popularity

  RULES:
    - Anti-cheat flags are IMMUTABLE events
    - Cross-domain GD room access = FORBIDDEN unless granted

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
F. ERP ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  F1. INSTITUTE ERP:
    - Cohort hiring readiness score (TPO dashboard)
    - Student-to-placement conversion rate
    - Domain-wise cohort performance breakdown
    - Engagement frequency of students (per institute)

  F2. CORPORATE / SME HIRING ERP:
    - Recruiter activity metrics (posts, views, shortlists, hires)
    - Hiring funnel efficiency (time per stage)
    - Offer-to-join ratio
    - Corporate ROI on platform spend

  F3. COMPLIANCE & AUDIT ERP:
    - SLA breach rate (recruiter response compliance)
    - Audit event log completeness score
    - Risk flag density (per tenant, per period)
    - Regulatory report generation status

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
G. GAMIFICATION ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Daily active users (DAU) by belt tier
    - Points economy flow (earned vs. spent vs. decayed)
    - Badge unlock distribution (rarity curve)
    - Referral conversion funnel (click → signup → active)
    - Clan activity index
    - Weekly challenge completion rate
    - Win streak multiplier utilization

  OUTPUTS:
    - Social share card generation events → feeds Distribution Analytics
    - Leaderboard snapshots (Redis-cached, 60s TTL)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
H. DISTRIBUTION / GROWTH ANALYTICS
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS:
    - Referral channel attribution (UTM-tracked)
    - QR scan → signup conversion rate
    - Ambassador leaderboard performance
    - Organic content reach (blog, YouTube, GitHub stars)
    - Campus ambassador cohort activation rate
    - Feature unlock referral completion rate
    - Social platform share → new user discovery funnel

  TOOLS:
    - UTM parameter tracking (across all acquisition channels)
    - Google Search Console integration (SEO channel)
    - GitHub API integration (open-source metrics)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
I. PLATFORM HEALTH ANALYTICS (PUBLIC + INTERNAL)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  METRICS (PUBLIC — status.ecoskiller.com):
    - Platform uptime (%)
    - Average API response time (ms)
    - Active users (anonymized count)
    - Incident status and resolution time

  METRICS (INTERNAL — Grafana, admin-only):
    - Kafka consumer lag per topic
    - Druid / ClickHouse query latency P50/P95/P99
    - Dead letter queue volume
    - Error rate per microservice
    - Data pipeline freshness (lag from event to dashboard)

  STACK:
    - Metrics Collection   = Prometheus
    - Visualization        = Grafana
    - Public Dashboard     = Grafana (read-only embed, status.ecoskiller.com)
    - Alerting             = Grafana Alerts → PagerDuty / Slack

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
6️⃣  AI / PREDICTIVE INTELLIGENCE LAYER (ADVISORY ONLY)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

MODELS (ALL ADVISORY — HUMAN APPROVAL REQUIRED FOR ACTIONS):

  MODEL_01: PLACEMENT_PROBABILITY_PREDICTOR
    Input       : Skill scores, project portfolio, GD scores, domain, location
    Output      : Probability score (0–100) of placement within 90 days
    Refresh     : Weekly batch + event-triggered update
    Display     : Student dashboard, recruiter view (with consent)

  MODEL_02: OFFER_ACCEPTANCE_PREDICTOR
    Input       : Candidate profile, offer CTC, company rating, role match score
    Output      : Probability of acceptance (for recruiter guidance)
    Refresh     : Per offer event
    Display     : Recruiter dashboard (advisory label: "Estimated Acceptance Probability")

  MODEL_03: SKILL_GAP_DETECTOR
    Input       : User skill inventory vs. market demand signals
    Output      : Ranked skill gap list, recommended path IDs
    Refresh     : Daily
    Display     : Student personal dashboard, TPO dashboard (cohort-level)

  MODEL_04: RECRUITER_BEHAVIOR_ANALYTICS
    Input       : Recruiter actions, response times, offer retraction rate, ratings
    Output      : Trust score (0–100), reliability tier (Platinum/Gold/Standard/Flagged)
    Refresh     : Weekly + event-triggered (retraction/flag)
    Display     : Admin Governance Dashboard, SME reliability badge on job listings

  MODEL_05: ENGAGEMENT_CHURN_PREDICTOR
    Input       : Login frequency, streak data, activity events, last session gap
    Output      : Churn risk score (Low/Medium/High/Critical)
    Refresh     : Daily batch
    Display     : Internal admin dashboard, automated re-engagement trigger (email/push)

  MODEL_06: RESUME_PARSER (DOCUMENT INTELLIGENCE)
    Input       : Uploaded resume (PDF/DOCX)
    Output      : Extracted skills, experience, education → structured profile fields
    Refresh     : On upload
    Display     : Autofill suggestion to user (user must confirm — AI does NOT autosave)

  AI HARD RULES (INHERITED FROM PARENT, RE-ENFORCED HERE):
    - AI output is ALWAYS labeled "AI-Suggested" or "Advisory"
    - AI does NOT approve, reject, or block any application, job, or user action
    - AI confidence score MUST be displayed alongside every prediction
    - User can dismiss/ignore any AI recommendation without penalty
    - AI models must be auditable (feature importance logged per prediction)
    - Bias monitoring required (quarterly audit per domain + gender proxy metrics)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
7️⃣  DASHBOARD ARCHITECTURE (PER USER GROUP)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

DASHBOARD COMPOSITION RULES (INHERITED FROM PARENT — STRICTLY ENFORCED):
  CUSTOMIZABLE  = 60% (widget position, visibility, priority, density, quick actions)
  FIXED         = 40% (identity block, compliance indicators, notifications,
                       critical alerts, trust & verification badges)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
STUDENT ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  FIXED WIDGETS:
    - Profile completion ring
    - Placement probability score (AI-advisory, labeled)
    - Skill gap alert (if critical gaps detected)
    - Compliance: verification badge status

  CUSTOMIZABLE WIDGETS:
    - Skill acquisition trend chart (7d / 30d / 90d)
    - Belt progression timeline
    - Active learning path progress bars
    - Dojo performance trend
    - Goal tracker (self-set goals vs. completion)
    - Points and rewards ledger
    - Upcoming challenges and deadlines

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RECRUITER / HR ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  FIXED WIDGETS:
    - Recruiter trust score (compliance indicator)
    - Active job posting health (fill rate alert)
    - Pending actions / SLA timer

  CUSTOMIZABLE WIDGETS:
    - Application funnel per posting
    - Candidate match score distribution
    - Offer acceptance prediction per active offer
    - Time-to-fill trend
    - Interview satisfaction rating received

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
INSTITUTE (TPO) ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  FIXED WIDGETS:
    - Cohort hiring readiness score
    - Compliance status (data completeness, verifications)

  CUSTOMIZABLE WIDGETS:
    - Domain-wise student performance breakdown
    - Placement funnel (applying → interviewed → placed)
    - Skill gap heatmap (cohort-level, anonymized individually)
    - Engagement frequency distribution
    - Top performing students (leaderboard, with consent)

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PLATFORM ADMIN ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  FIXED WIDGETS:
    - Platform health vitals (uptime, latency, error rate)
    - Compliance risk flag density
    - Audit log completeness

  CUSTOMIZABLE WIDGETS:
    - Tenant activity heatmap
    - Churn risk distribution (by user group, domain)
    - Revenue & subscription analytics
    - Distribution channel attribution
    - Gamification economy health (points in / out / decay)
    - Bug report and feature request board metrics

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PARENT DASHBOARD (READ-ONLY, TRUST LAYER)
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ACCESS    = Read-only. Zero mutation capability.
  SCOPE     = Own ward's data only (consent-gated)
  WIDGETS:
    - Ward's profile completion status
    - Activity frequency summary
    - Skill progress summary
    - Placement probability (advisory, labeled)
    - Upcoming scheduled events (GD sessions, interviews)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
8️⃣  REPORTING ENGINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REPORT TYPES:
  REAL-TIME     : Live KPI tiles (Druid + Redis cache, ≤60s lag)
  SCHEDULED     : Daily / Weekly / Monthly digests (Spark batch)
  ON-DEMAND     : User/Admin triggered exports
  REGULATORY    : Compliance reports (immutable, signed, audit-grade)

EXPORT FORMATS:
  PDF           = Executive summaries, compliance reports
  CSV / XLSX    = Raw data exports (admin only, RBAC-gated)
  JSON API      : Programmatic access (Integration Hub, rate-limited)
  Grafana Embed : Public health dashboard only

REPORT DELIVERY:
  In-app        = Dashboard widgets and report section
  Email         = Scheduled digests (opt-in, GDPR-compliant)
  Webhook       = Enterprise ERP integrations (via Integration Hub)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
9️⃣  MICROSERVICE FLOWS (LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

FLOW_01: REAL-TIME ANALYTICS PIPELINE
  User Action
    → Kafka Event (with tenant_id, domain_track, user_id)
    → Flink Stream Processor
      → Schema validation (Avro registry)
      → Tenant isolation check
      → Enrichment (user context, domain metadata)
    → Druid (hot store, real-time OLAP)
    → Redis (KPI tile cache update)
    → Dashboard WebSocket push (live tile refresh)

FLOW_02: BATCH ANALYTICS PIPELINE
  Flink → Spark Batch Job (nightly / weekly)
    → ClickHouse (warm aggregations)
    → AI Model Input Pipeline (skill gap, churn, placement prediction)
    → Report Generation (PDF / CSV)
    → Scheduled Delivery (email / in-app)

FLOW_03: AI PREDICTION FLOW
  Trigger Event (profile update / skill completion / offer event)
    → Analytics Service
    → Feature Store (Redis + ClickHouse)
    → AI Model Inference
    → Prediction stored with confidence score + model version
    → Notification Service → User ("AI Suggestion" — labeled)
    → Human must act; AI does not act

FLOW_04: GAMIFICATION → ANALYTICS → DISTRIBUTION FLOW
  User Achievement Event
    → Kafka → Analytics Service
    → Achievement Check (points, belt, badge)
    → Gamification DB update
    → Notification Service → User
    → Share Card Generation (if eligible)
    → Integration Hub → Social Platform
    → Referral tracking event logged back to Analytics

FLOW_05: COMPLIANCE / AUDIT ANALYTICS FLOW
  Any privileged action (recruiter offer retract, admin flag, etc.)
    → Immutable audit_analytics_log entry (PostgreSQL, append-only)
    → Compliance ERP dashboard update
    → Risk score recalculation (if threshold breach: ALERT)
    → Regulatory report queue (batch, signed PDF export)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔟  SECURITY & PRIVACY (STRICT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

DATA CLASSIFICATION:
  PUBLIC        : Platform health metrics (Grafana public dashboard)
  INTERNAL      : Aggregate tenant metrics (admin only)
  CONFIDENTIAL  : Individual user analytics (RBAC-gated, user-owned)
  RESTRICTED    : Audit logs, compliance reports (Compliance Admin only)

PII HANDLING:
  - PII NEVER stored in event payloads (referenced by user_id only)
  - PII decoupled at query time via User Service join (authorized callers only)
  - Anonymization required for cohort-level reports (k-anonymity ≥ 5)
  - Data deletion requests → cascade to all analytics stores (GDPR right-to-erasure)

TENANT ISOLATION:
  - All Druid/ClickHouse queries MUST include tenant_id filter (enforced at query layer)
  - Cross-tenant data access = SECURITY_FAILURE → STOP_EXECUTION + ALERT
  - Row-level security enforced in PostgreSQL analytics tables

ENCRYPTION:
  - In transit   = TLS 1.3 (all services)
  - At rest      = AES-256 (all stores)
  - S3/GCS cold  = Server-side encryption + customer-managed keys (enterprise tenants)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣1️⃣  PLATFORM OBSERVABILITY (SELF-ANALYTICS)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

AntiGravity monitors itself:

  METRICS:
    - Kafka consumer lag per topic (alert if > 10k messages)
    - Flink job health (checkpoint success rate, restart frequency)
    - Druid segment load status
    - ClickHouse query latency P50/P95/P99
    - Redis hit rate (cache efficiency)
    - Dead letter queue volume (schema failures, alert threshold: >50/hour)
    - AI model inference latency (alert if P95 > 2 seconds)
    - Data pipeline freshness (event → dashboard lag, alert if > 5 minutes)
    - Report generation success rate

  ALERTING:
    - PagerDuty: P1 (data loss, security breach, pipeline down)
    - Slack/Email: P2 (lag spike, model degradation, high error rate)
    - Auto-healing: Flink job restart policy (3 retries, exponential backoff)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣2️⃣  INTEGRATION SURFACE (ANTIGRAVITY CONNECT POINTS)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

INBOUND (AntiGravity consumes):
  - Kafka topics from ALL source systems (listed in §3)
  - Elasticsearch (search behavior signals)
  - Prometheus (infrastructure metrics)

OUTBOUND (AntiGravity produces):
  - Redis KPI tiles → Flutter App + React Web dashboards
  - WebSocket push → real-time dashboard widget refresh
  - REST API → Integration Hub (enterprise ERP, TPO systems)
  - Kafka → Notification Service (AI suggestions, churn alerts)
  - Grafana (public + internal dashboards)
  - Report files → S3/GCS (delivered via signed URL or email)

API RULES:
  - All AntiGravity APIs are RBAC-gated
  - Rate limits enforced per tenant per endpoint
  - No raw analytics API exposed publicly (aggregates only, tenant-scoped)
  - API versioning = SEMVER, backward compatibility maintained for 2 major versions

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣3️⃣  DEVELOPMENT STAGE LOCK (SEQUENTIAL ENFORCEMENT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

AntiGravity is a STAGE 2 module. It CANNOT be built until Stage 1 is complete.

STAGE 1 PREREQUISITES (MUST BE COMPLETED FIRST):
  ✅ Identity system (user_id, tenant_id, domain_track)
  ✅ Authentication + Authorization (RBAC + ABAC)
  ✅ Core data models (users, jobs, skills, projects, dojo sessions)
  ✅ Kafka event bus operational
  ✅ PostgreSQL transactional DB live

STAGE 2 BUILD ORDER (WITHIN ANTIGRAVITY):
  STEP 1: Event schema registry + Kafka topic provisioning
  STEP 2: Flink stream processor (raw ingestion + validation)
  STEP 3: Druid hot store (real-time OLAP)
  STEP 4: Redis cache layer + WebSocket push
  STEP 5: ClickHouse warm store + Spark batch jobs
  STEP 6: AI model feature store + initial model deployment
  STEP 7: Dashboard API layer (per user group)
  STEP 8: Reporting engine (scheduled + on-demand)
  STEP 9: Compliance analytics + audit pipeline
  STEP 10: Self-observability (Prometheus + Grafana)
  STEP 11: Public health dashboard (status.ecoskiller.com)

Skipping steps = INVALID BUILD. Execute sequentially.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔒 SEAL DECLARATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

MODULE                      : ANALYTICS_CONNECT (ANTIGRAVITY)
PARENT                      : ECOSKILLER ENTERPRISE MULTI-TENANT SAAS
SEALED BY                   : PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE AUTHORITY
MUTATION AUTHORITY          : PLATFORM_ADMIN + ADD_ONLY POLICY
OVERRIDE AUTHORITY          : NONE (no creative interpretation permitted)
COMPLIANCE INHERITANCE      : CONFIRMED (RBAC, ABAC, MFA, Audit, GDPR-aligned)
AI POLICY                   : ADVISORY ONLY — AI NEVER APPROVES OR BLOCKS
CROSS-TENANT ACCESS         : FORBIDDEN (HARD LOCK)
CROSS-DOMAIN ACCESS         : FORBIDDEN UNLESS EXPLICITLY GRANTED
STAGE DEPENDENCY            : STAGE 1 MUST PRECEDE STAGE 2

🔐 THIS MODULE IS SEALED. ALL ADDITIONS MUST FOLLOW ADD_ONLY POLICY.
   MODIFICATIONS REQUIRE PLATFORM ADMIN AUTHORITY AND FULL AUDIT LOG ENTRY.
   ANY DEVIATION FROM THIS SPECIFICATION = INVALID BUILD → STOP EXECUTION.

╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  🔒 ANALYTICS_CONNECT — ANTIGRAVITY — SEALED & LOCKED ✅                           ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
